item.title: Cat mom is questioning the joys of motherhood
item.description: Help control the pet population. Have your pets spayed or neutered. - Bob Barker
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: Not good
item.description: My cat had been heading downhill, and had a vet appt. Scheduled for Monday morning. The Saturday before we thought he had gotten outside and disappeared. Fast forward 2 weeks and there's a horrid smell coming from the laundry room. Spent hours tracking the smell to behind a wall in the laundry room. After ripping off half the drywall and pulling out insulation I found him. He's been my shadow for the past 5 years, we had no idea how old he was when we got him. He was the best, most cuddly, gentle sweet boy and my heart is breaking while typing this.
item.dc:creator: Blueb3

item.title: Update to an update for the update (check my previous posts)
item.description: That went a bit faster than expected though the whole process of suing them will probably gonna last long. Especially that they are getting charged up the ass for their scams. Apparently they cheated a lot of people around in many different ways. Well this is about to end. I'm doing kinda ok, all this costs a lot and I am barely scraping by but I am scraping by. Couple months probably till I actually work myself back but doing all I can. I'm working two jobs today so might be very slow to respond to comments until I come back home at night
item.dc:creator: TyrCarter

item.title: California GOP Candidate Calls Auschwitz a “Solution,” Gets Only Platform He Deserves: None
item.description:
“* **** ** **** ****** *** ***’* *** ** **,” said Langford, a wannabe nazi piece of dog shit, who would throw your family in prison or in front of a firing squad if they disagree with his fascist ideology. “**’** **** ** **** ***, * ******* ** *** ** *******.”
“Alpine 6 Action News does not platform fascists. We do not present “both sides” of genocide. We do not “contextualize” calls for state-run murder factories. Kyle Langford is a fascist. Not a “provocateur,” not a “populist,” not a “fringe conservative.” He is a man running for office on a platform that includes the mass incarceration and murder of vulnerable people. His speech is not a policy disagreement. It is a threat. And like every fascist before him, he’s using democracy only long enough to dismantle it.” - It’s around this point I’d say this article is satire, and while AP6 does post almost entirely satire, I feel the usual tags have no place here. The only platform this nazi will get is the one built to support the gallows where he shall hang from his hubris, if not a rough spun rope. https://alpine6.com/2025/07/28/california-gop-candidate-calls-auschwitz-a-solution-gets-only-platform-he-deserves-none/
item.dc:creator: ItsActuallyDavidNow

item.title: Memes/tomfoolery
item.description:
OOOOO!!!
Uncle Buck knows how to boogie. Oh and check out Cool Runnings (again), shit aged like a pricey cheese
The new Superman was fine. I never thought he was that interesting of a character. Mr Terrific was great, but I don't think he could hold everyone's attention for a whole solo movie. I'm going to see every movie Gunn directs opening weekend probably til I die. I'm not sure if these are hot takes, but that's all I got for you.

item.title: We are the bad place
item.description: The current Administration is held bent on making a perceived enemy out of nothing. That they're abandoning United States citizens for the bigoted Playbook they're running Front page. So my living situation is not exactly stable. Recovering from homelessness. And that's my phone has made it illegal to be homeless. I'm a disabled combat veteran, and my wife is terminally ill. The programs that I moved across the country for got shut down due to lack of fun and thanks to the executive order written on January 20th. I'm tired of almost getting there and then getting knocked right back on my ass. They've also made it possible for creditors to start putting things back on reports, even though it dropped off more than 8 years ago. My credit has tanked randomly and all the work I did for the last 5 years has gone out the window. They quite literally are trying to make it impossible for anybody to survive. Especially if you have a left-leaning bias. I'm so very tired of all this. I don't know when I serve this country for. Because this is certainly not the country that I once believed in. Depressed and not sure how much longer I want to stay on this ride
item.dc:creator: JustGridSquares

item.title: Age of Excess Dump #12 - Memeflix and Chill
item.description:
(Disclaimer: I take no responsibility for the conditions of any of the crops, I just harvest them.)
Yes, yes. I know.
but...
"Lowrider, Scarlett. Scarlett? Lowrider."
I grew up with the 'bears. AND their cousins.
Not pictured: The ac unit from Hell. RIP Phil
"C'mere, Boogerlips!"
And you KNOW Goofy is flexible
Here we go again...
TWFTFEJN was/is the shit!
strt
Beautiful Oregon
I miss Smartsound
Shut up about the passage of time.
This is true of Doctor Who, as well.
Classic
...don't...
Miss Jane...
Probably reversed as well.
Yeah. For real.
Blow gently on your screen
I still have two old totes full of these guys.
Issac Hayes and Michael Bolton - 1990 Grammys for reference: https://i.imgur.com/6PlRXhI.gif
MmHmm.
Srsly tho.

item.title: Conservatism has always been on a steady march towards where we are now. Always has been.
item.description: I can confirm. I view MAGA as monsters, and I only wish the worst for all of them. MAGA dad, who fled to Russia, was blown up by a drone strike. Ok? Good, next. MAGA couple lose their government jobs because they were purged by DOGE? Ok, hope they starve slowly. MAGA community wiped out by flooding, and now they're wondering where FEMA is? Tell them to shove their concerns right up where they get their opinions and facts from.
item.dc:creator: SteveBestFriendAndTrustedColleague

item.title: More laughs for fake internet points
item.dc:creator: Nerdy0ne

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1426 (prophetic microplastics)
item.description:
It's amazing how things in a collapsing republic over 2000 years ago can resonate so much with what I see when doomscrolling. Anyway. Let's get this bread.
Eastern Kingbird mobbing an Osprey who has... some kind of fish.
Yup.
I do not fear the Basilisk. It's just Calvinism for tech bros.
Yup.
Hell yeah. And maybe we can hold hands afterwards.
Hood(ed) Oriole.
Oh, Sheogorath. I wish I could afford good cheese right now.
Venomous Reptiles of Arizona in the shape of Arizona.
This image makes me think of the classic Gordon Lightfoot song "Ships of the horn," but i think that's actually about the Drake Passage in South America? Someone correct me if I'm wrong?
Oh boy I feel the dissociation coming on strong
7:20 AM and ive already applied to three jobs.
Fuck Ayn Rand.
I'm so tired of this. And nobody wants me. Yay.
*goes back in time to curb-stomp Tiiktalik
I love how the only definite non-human existential question ever recorded is from a bird, specifically Alex the African Grey. He asked what color he was, when doing color training.
Job hunting is so much like dating apps that its honestly extremely disheartening.
I want to write a short story about the batshit that is the Herxheim archeology site. It seems, maybe, to have been a community of cannibals? Maybe? I had a dream once where I was friends with a wizard with time magic, a Chronomancer. He said there were others who had his skill, and Tolkien was one, and that he based Sauron as a character, and some aspects of the War of the Ring on the "Cannibal necromancer king" of Herxheim who was named Annatarioskaron. Apparently, they were eating people to raise them from the dead to create an army invincible to a great plague decending on the land. Again, all a dream. But the late Neolithic in Western Europe was wild and seems to have been an incredibly violent time of collapse.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Glory Pippin!" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett
